Name: Thwarting the Arrow
Description: Combining their nature as a tool-using human with the unpredictable nuances of spirit, the Garou exerts dominance over incoming projectiles — spears, arrows, and even bullets — causing them to waver in flight, reluctant to harm the user. A Weaver vector-spirit grants this Gift.
System: The Garou gains their Honor as bonus dice to all tests to avoid projectile weapons. This Gift can be used only in crinos form.
